content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — description.txt claims "Built-in ad blocker" and "AI-powered suggestions", but ContentView.swift is a plain SwiftUI task list with no ad-blocking (no Content Blocker extension, no SafariServices) and no ML/AI code (no CoreML/CreateML or heuristic logic).
Pierre: Apple rejects apps under 2.1 when marketing copy promises features the reviewer can't find in the binary. The entire codebase is a simple string-array task list (App/ContentView.swift:1-20), so the "ad blocker" and "AI-powered suggestions" claims in fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt have no code evidence; only "works fully offline" is trivially true. Either implement these features or remove the claims from the description before submission.
